name: FP32 inner product

description: Compute the FP64 dot product of two double arrays

description: Compute the length of many short null-terminated strings

name: strlen long strings

name: Particle motion
description: Advance 3D particle positions by a time step with modular boundary wrapping

description: Write a marker value to a set of scattered (non-contiguous) memory locations

name: Sum of abs diffs

description: Multiply two small fixed-size FP32 matrices

description: Convert a UTF-16 string to narrow ASCII chars, skipping high surrogate pairs

description: Compute element-wise fast approximate reciprocal division of FP64 arrays

description: Scale each FP64 element by an integer power of two

name: Short string compares

name: Array addition

description: Clamp each element of an integer sequence to data-dependent [min, max] bounds

name: Upscale filter
description: Upscale a pixel buffer by splitting each element into its high and low halves

description: Count the frequency of each byte value in a large buffer (histogram)

name: whitespace
description: Find all whitespace character positions in a byte string

description: Compute byte-value frequency histogram using segmented counting

name: Cascade summation
description: Sum adjacent FP value pairs in a cascading pairwise reduction

name: Auto-correlation
